info.title: SDKWork BirdCoder Backend API

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: Filter resources to a single user principal.

parameters.name: workspaceId
parameters.description: Filter resources to a single workspace.

environmentKey.description: Known values include dev, test, staging, and prod.

runtime.description: Known values include web, desktop, server, container, and kubernetes.

releaseKind.description: Known values include formal, canary, hotfix, rollback.

status.description: Known values include pending, ready, running, succeeded, failed, rolled_back.

data.description: Operation-specific payload typed per response schema.
